CLAUSE.NAME: Ack_SendToRec_Info
CLAUSE.value: Refering to you: MT740,DD.[[[ISSUE_DT]]] D/C no.: [[[LC_NO]]] issuing bank:[[[ISSUE_BK_NM]]] , [[[ISSUE_BK_ADD1]]] available with: [[[AVAL_WT_BK_NM]]] , [[[AVAL_WT_BK_ADD1]]] Amount: [[[LC_CCY]]] [[[LC_AMT]]] Following our swifts sent to your head office on .. .. and .. .. and the recent meeting of Mr. .. at your H.O. in .. , we are no longer in a position to handle such reimbursement instructions. We kindly ask you to route your reimbursement authorisation through any other channels available to you.. Please confirm by return authenticated SWIFT message, that you have received this message and send us your confirmation about cancellation of the a/m MT740 dd. .. ... Please also inform beneficiary party accordingly.. Many thanks in advance.
